overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character walking through the ancient Egyptian Temple of Karnak. The character passes through colonnades with hieroglyphic walls, monumental gateways, courtyards with sphinx statues, and approaches colossal pharaoh statues before ascending stone stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Egyptian temple colonnade with hieroglyphic walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the temple colonnade toward the inner gateway

notable_agents.action: temple worker walking past the character on the left
group of people walking away through the colonnade

entered.detail: massive stone columns with blue and yellow lotus decorations at the base
stone walls covered in Egyptian hieroglyphic reliefs
large bronze ceremonial bowls on stands flanking the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an ancient Egyptian temple colonnade with massive decorated pillars and hieroglyphic walls. Large bronze offering bowls stand on either side of the stone pathway as a few temple workers pass by.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hypostyle gateway with massive columns

events.description: passing from outer colonnade into the grand gateway with larger columns

agents.ego_description: walking through the monumental gateway with towering decorated columns

notable_agents.action: temple guard walking ahead on the left side

entered.detail: enormous stone pillars with elaborate capitals supporting the gateway roof
red fabric sunshades visible in the side courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character passes through a monumental gateway with massive columns decorated with hieroglyphics. The space opens slightly as red canopy awnings become visible in side areas, and a temple guard walks ahead on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open courtyard with recumbent sphinx statues and offering altars

events.description: emerging from covered gateway into open courtyard with sphinx statues
character turns slightly left to navigate around the sphinx statue

agents.ego_description: walking through the courtyard examining the sphinx statues and temple surroundings

notable_agents.action: temple worker tending to offerings near the sphinx

entered.detail: large stone sphinx statues lying on plinths with offering bowls in front
stone altars with burning incense and offerings
palm trees visible over the temple walls

segments.scene_description: Emerging into an open courtyard, the character navigates around massive recumbent sphinx statues. Offering altars with burning incense line the path, and palm trees are visible beyond the temple walls as the character turns left to continue.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple entrance with colossal pharaoh statues and ascending staircase

events.description: approaching the massive standing pharaoh statues flanking the entrance
character begins ascending the stone stairs between the colossi

agents.ego_description: walking between two colossal pharaoh statues and ascending the temple stairs

notable_agents.action: person ascending the stairs ahead of the character

entered.detail: massive standing statues of pharaohs wearing nemes headdresses flanking the entrance
wide stone stairs leading up to the inner temple

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and walks between two colossal standing pharaoh statues that flank the temple entrance. After passing between the massive figures, the character begins ascending a wide stone staircase leading deeper into the temple complex.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the interior of an ancient Egyptian temple that gradually opens from narrow colonnades into a vast, monumental courtyard. It begins by following a character through a corridor of massive decorated pillars and hieroglyphic walls, passing bronze offering bowls and temple workers. As the character moves forward, the space expands through a monumental gateway where red canopy awnings appear in the periphery and a temple guard leads the way. The scene then opens into a wide courtyard filled with recumbent sphinx statues and burning incense altars before turning left toward the temple entrance. Finally, the camera passes between two colossal standing pharaoh statues as the character begins ascending a wide stone staircase leading deeper into the complex.
